choose.when: SELECT s.data_type AS datatype, dt.datatype_label AS datatypeLabel, SUM(s.match_count) AS count, 0 AS processedCount, 0 AS truePositiveCount FROM pi_summary s INNER JOIN pi_targets t ON s.target_id = t.target_id AND s.ap_no = t.ap_no LEFT JOIN pi_datatypes dt ON s.data_type = dt.datatype_id WHERE t.TARGET_USE = 'Y' AND t.group_id = #{groupId} GROUP BY s.data_type, dt.datatype_label ORDER BY count DESC
choose.otherwise: SELECT s.data_type AS datatype, dt.datatype_label AS datatypeLabel, SUM(s.match_count) AS count, 0 AS processedCount, 0 AS truePositiveCount FROM pi_summary s LEFT JOIN pi_datatypes dt ON s.data_type = dt.datatype_id GROUP BY s.data_type, dt.datatype_label ORDER BY count DESC

mapper.select: SELECT agent_stat.totalAgents, agent_stat.activeAgents, agent_stat.inactiveAgents, scan_stat.totalScans, scan_stat.runningScans, scan_stat.scheduledScans, 'NORMAL' AS systemStatus, NOW() AS lastUpdateTime FROM ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalAgents, SUM(CASE WHEN agent_connected = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS activeAgents, SUM(CASE WHEN agent_connected = 0 OR agent_connected IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS inactiveAgents FROM pi_agents WHERE AGENT_USE = 'Y' ) agent_stat, ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalScans, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'running' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS runningScans, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'scheduled' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS scheduledScans FROM pi_scan_history ) scan_stat

choose.when: SELECT f.path AS path, COUNT(*) AS detectionCount, 0 AS truePositiveCount, t.name AS targetName FROM pi_find f INNER JOIN pi_targets t ON f.target_id = t.target_id AND f.ap_no = t.ap_no WHERE t.TARGET_USE = 'Y' AND t.group_id = #{groupId} GROUP BY f.path, t.name ORDER BY detectionCount DESC LIMIT 20
choose.otherwise: SELECT page.path, page.detectionCount, 0 AS truePositiveCount, t.name AS targetName FROM ( SELECT f.path, f.target_id, f.ap_no, COUNT(*) AS detectionCount FROM pi_find f GROUP BY f.path, f.target_id, f.ap_no ORDER BY detectionCount DESC LIMIT 20 ) page INNER JOIN pi_targets t ON page.target_id = t.target_id AND page.ap_no = t.ap_no

when.test: (groupId != null and groupId != '') or (startDate != null and startDate != '') or (endDate != null and endDate != '')

choose.otherwise: SELECT IFNULL(dt.datatype_label, s.data_type) AS label, SUM(s.match_count) AS value FROM pi_summary s LEFT JOIN pi_datatypes dt ON s.data_type = dt.datatype_id GROUP BY s.data_type, dt.datatype_label ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 10

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalAgents, SUM(CASE WHEN a.agent_connected = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS connectedAgents, SUM(CASE WHEN a.agent_connected = 0 OR a.agent_connected IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS disconnectedAgents, SUM(CASE WHEN a.AGENT_USE = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS activeAgents, SUM(CASE WHEN a.AGENT_USE != 'Y' OR a.AGENT_USE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS inactiveAgents FROM pi_agents a

SELECT dp_stat.pendingApprovals, dp_stat.returnedItems, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pi_scan_history WHERE status = 'scheduled') AS scheduledScans FROM ( SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN approval_status = 'W' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pendingApprovals, SUM(CASE WHEN approval_status = 'R' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS returnedItems FROM pi_data_processing ) dp_stat

SELECT total.cnt AS totalFindings, processed.cnt AS processedCount, (total.cnt - processed.cnt) AS unprocessedCount, ROUND(processed.cnt * 100.0 / NULLIF(total.cnt, 0), 1) AS implementationRate FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM pi_find f INNER JOIN pi_targets t ON f.target_id = t.target_id AND f.ap_no = t.ap_no WHERE t.TARGET_USE = 'Y') total, (SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM pi_data_processing WHERE processing_flag IS NOT NULL AND processing_flag != 0) processed

SELECT sh.target_id AS targetId, t.name AS targetName, sh.started AS startedAt, sh.status AS scanStatus, sh.regdate AS scanDate FROM pi_scan_history sh INNER JOIN pi_targets t ON sh.target_id = t.target_id AND sh.ap_no = t.ap_no WHERE t.TARGET_USE = 'Y' ORDER BY sh.regdate DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT total.cnt AS totalFindings, dp_stat.approvedCount, dp_stat.rejectedCount, dp_stat.waitingCount, dp_stat.returnedCount, ROUND( (dp_stat.approvedCount + dp_stat.rejectedCount) * 100.0 / NULLIF(total.cnt, 0), 1 ) AS completionRate FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM pi_find f INNER JOIN pi_targets t ON f.target_id = t.target_id AND f.ap_no = t.ap_no WHERE t.TARGET_USE = 'Y') total, (SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN approval_status = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS approvedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN approval_status = 'N' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rejectedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN approval_status = 'W' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS waitingCount, SUM(CASE WHEN approval_status = 'R' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS returnedCount FROM pi_data_processing) dp_stat

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT F.hash_id) FROM pi_find F INNER JOIN pi_targets T ON F.target_id = T.target_id AND F.ap_no = T.ap_no WHERE F.deldate IS NULL AND T.TARGET_USE = 'Y') AS find_path, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT DP.hash_id) FROM pi_data_processing DP INNER JOIN pi_targets T ON DP.target_id = T.target_id AND DP.ap_no = T.ap_no WHERE DP.approval_type = 1 AND T.TARGET_USE = 'Y') AS processing_path, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT I.path) FROM pi_inaccess I INNER JOIN pi_targets T ON I.target_id = T.target_id AND I.ap_no = T.ap_no WHERE T.TARGET_USE = 'Y') AS inaccess_path

SELECT COUNT(DP.hash_id) AS approval_file, SUM(IF(DPF.`type` = 0, 1, 0)) AS approval_false FROM pi_data_processing DP INNER JOIN pi_data_processing_flag DPF ON DP.processing_flag = DPF.processing_flag WHERE DP.approval_type = 1
